narrative:
Riley (precinct in Sandusky County) has 827 registered voters, with 48.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.1 percentage points.
